title: Infinite Villager Trade
description: InfiniteTrades permanently removes all trade limits for villagers and wandering traders on all Spigot, Paper, and Purpur servers from version 1.21 onwards.
body:
# 🪙 InfiniteTrades

Tired of villagers locking their trades right when you finally got enough emeralds? **InfiniteTrades** is a lightweight, ultra-performance-friendly solution that unlocks endless trading for your server. No more wait times, no more locked professions—just infinite trading!

---

## ✨ Features

* 🔄 **True Infinite Trading:** Automatically bumps the maximum trade limit of every single offer to over **2.1 Billion** (`Integer.MAX_VALUE`).
* 🏪 **Full Merchant Support:** Works flawlessly for both standard **Villagers** and **Wandering Traders**.
* ⚡ **Lag-Free & Lightweight:** Built with highly optimized event-driven logic. It only triggers when a player opens a trading interface, meaning **zero background lag** for your server.
* 📝 **Clean Server Logs:** All console notifications (enable/disable messages) are fully localized in **English** to keep your server logs clean and professional.

---

## 🚀 Compatibility

Thanks to strict adherence to the official Bukkit/Spigot API, this plugin is completely independent of internal Minecraft server code (No NMS). This makes it 100% future-proof and robust against game updates.

| Software | Supported | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Spigot** | ✅ Yes | Native support |
| **Paper** | ✅ Yes | Fully compatible |
| **Purpur** | ✅ Yes | Fully compatible |

### 📅 Supported Versions

* **Minecraft 1.21** up to **26.1.2+**
* *No recompilation or updates needed between versions! Install it once, run it forever.*

---

## 🛠️ Installation

1. **Download the JAR:** Get the latest release.
Download the `InfiniteTrades.jar` file from the versions tab.


2. **Upload to Server:** Place it in the plugins folder.
Drop the downloaded `.jar` file directly into your server's `plugins/` directory.


3. **Restart or Load:** Do not use heavy reload commands.
Restart your server (or use a plugin manager like PlugManX to load it).


---

> 💡 **Note:** This plugin does not require any configuration out of the box. Just drag, drop, and enjoy endless trading with your favorite villagers!
